PDF Generate 3-5 bullet points to prepare me for a meeting with ... - Align
 www.align.com/hubfs/_Web Assets/2024/Copilot Prompting Toolkit_All Resources.pdf
Prompts are how you ask Microsoft 365 Copilot to do something for you — like creating, summarizing, editing, or transforming. Think about prompting like having a conversation, using plain but clear language and providing context like you would with an assistant.

Military Performance Evaluation Writing Assistant | RapidEPR
 rapidepr.com
AI-powered writing assistant for all military performance evaluations. Generate professional bullets and citations for EPRs, NCOERs, Navy Evals, and award nominations across all military branches.
